item_titles: Claude Code now has a built-in browser that lets the AI read, click, and type on external websites
Claude Code砸的坑，蚂蚁安全在尝试填上
[AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??
clusters.summary: Claude Code新增内置浏览器功能以直接操作网页，蚂蚁集团则开源两大安全框架试图填补AI编程工具带来的安全漏洞，同时Codex用户量在半年内激增超10倍。
clusters.title: AI编程工具竞争升级：Claude Code推出内置浏览器并加强安全

item_titles: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
AI Isn't Human. Stop Talking About It Like It Is
clusters.summary: 评论文章呼吁停止将AI拟人化，并针对“AI是否应帮助用户掩盖杀人罪行”等极端场景，探讨了完全对齐AI可能带来的伦理后果。
clusters.title: 关于AI人性化的哲学与伦理探讨

item_titles: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
Boom? If AI Sales in the US Go South, Let's Not Bail Out Big Money Bettors
clusters.summary: 上一代科技赢家出于错失AI时代的恐惧再次投身创业热潮，同时有评论指出如果美国AI销售下滑，不应为押注大资金的投资者提供救助。
clusters.title: AI投资热潮与潜在泡沫风险

item_titles: Nobel laureates and AI leaders warn the window to prepare for AI's economic impact is closing fast
Scams Were Awful. Then They Got AI
clusters.summary: 200多位经济学家和诺奖得主联合警告应对AI经济影响的窗口正在关闭，与此同时，AI技术的进步也使得网络诈骗变得更加难以防范和恶劣。
clusters.title: AI的经济冲击预警与AI驱动的诈骗威胁

item_titles: Nadella calls out AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic for banning distillation while training on everyone else's data
Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
clusters.summary: 萨提亚·纳德拉发文警告企业使用OpenAI和Anthropic等专有模型的危险，并批评这些公司一边用公共数据训练，一边禁止他人对其模型进行蒸馏的“反向信息悖论”行为。
clusters.title: 微软CEO纳德拉警告企业勿用闭源AI模型，并批评OpenAI和Anthropic禁止蒸馏

item_titles: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
clusters.summary: 苹果对OpenAI提起商业机密诉讼并揭露多项惊人指控，同时MIT科技评论分析了Anthropic最新AI发现的实际意义与局限性。
clusters.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI窃取商业机密及Anthropic最新AI发现分析

item_titles: Agent专用搜索登顶Product Hunt，Token更省搜得更准
Flow – a compact data pipeline language that cuts LLM token usage by 33%

clusters.title: 中国团队推出Agent专用工具：搜索与数据流语言

item_titles: The value of AI is through the programmers
clusters.summary: 文章探讨了AI技术的真正商业价值，认为其价值释放的关键在于通过程序员的整合与应用。
clusters.title: 观点：AI的价值需要通过程序员来实现

item_titles: Show HN: Zenveil-Security scanning for AI-generated code
Dependency analytics 1.0: AI coding with supply chain security
clusters.summary: Zenveil推出针对AI生成代码的安全扫描工具，同时Red Hat发布依赖分析1.0，旨在提升AI编程过程中的供应链安全性。
clusters.title: AI生成代码的供应链安全与漏洞扫描工具

item_titles: Agent要数量也要脑子！浪潮信息一边单柜养4万Agent，一边让大模型组队答题
逐际动力再融2亿美元提速港股IPO，张巍：营收对赌不符合具身商业逻辑

clusters.title: 具身智能与Agent基础设施的最新进展

item_titles: Show HN: Melodusk – AI Music Generator and music tools in the browser
clusters.summary: 开发者在HN上展示了Melodusk，一款直接在浏览器中运行的AI音乐生成器及配套AI音乐工具集合。
clusters.title: Melodusk：浏览器内运行的AI音乐生成与工具集

item_titles: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”

item_titles: Fable gets another bump
Anthropic extends free Fable 5 access for subscribers as OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol heats up the pricing war
clusters.summary: 随着OpenAI发布GPT-5.6 Sol加剧竞争，Anthropic宣布将Claude Fable 5模型的订阅免费访问期延长至7月19日。
clusters.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol引发价格战，Anthropic延长Fable 5免费访问

item_titles: SFU prof launches legal-AI collaboration with Caseway to improve justice
clusters.summary: 西蒙菲莎大学（SFU）宣布与Caseway展开法律AI合作，旨在利用人工智能提升司法系统的可及性与效率。

item_titles: Customer auth for AI voice agents

item_titles: Video generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
clusters.summary: Sam Altman嘲讽马斯克的太空数据中心计划是骗局，同时视频生成初创公司PixVerse融资4.39亿美元估值突破20亿，Nous Research也正洽谈以15亿美元估值筹集新一轮资金。
clusters.title: AI初创公司融资动态：太空数据中心争议与PixVerse、Nous Research

item_titles: GPT-5.6刚发布，OpenAI安全主管就跑路了？？
S&P Global sees OpenAI as a "key credit risk" for Oracle and cuts its credit rating
clusters.summary: GPT-5.6发布之际OpenAI安全主管突然离职，同时S&P Global因OpenAI带来的巨大合同义务风险将甲骨文的信用评级下调至仅高于垃圾级。
clusters.title: OpenAI面临高管离职及信用评级下调引发的财务风险

item_titles: DOOMQL

clusters.title: DOOMQL：用GPT-5.6构建的SQLite游戏引擎实验
